status: BLOCKED — independent maker≠checker review and eval judging could not complete
blocker: All four fresh reviewers (project-factory code-reviewer, security-reviewer, spec-compliance-auditor, eval-judge) were dispatched in parallel over the staged working-tree diff, but each terminated on the platform session/usage limit (resets 01:30 UTC) before emitting a verdict. Raw transcripts under reviews/raw/ show the limit termination, not findings. Per AGENTS.md evidence discipline, a clean maker≠checker result cannot be claimed without real reviewer output, so this slice is NOT archived and NO PR is opened as 'done'.
evalJudge: dispatched, no verdict — session limit (0 tool uses). The eval case exists (evals/cases/ledger-items.eval.ts, dimension ua-error-clarity) and its produced output is saved under reviews/eval-produced-output.txt, but it has NOT been independently graded. evals/results/latest.json and quality/eval-baseline.json are intentionally LEFT UNCHANGED — no fabricated score.

interimSelfAudit.byRole: maker (parent) — NOT an independent check; recorded only as an interim correctness pass while the fresh reviewers are blocked
interimSelfAudit.result: no blocker found; one accepted minor noted
checked: Domain purity: ledger-filter.ts and ledger-item-edit.ts import only domain types (TC-PURE-01); no Next/DB import.
Amount parsing: parseAmountToMinor rejects '', non-numeric, zero, negative, >2-decimals, and multi-separator ('1,2,3') input; signed amount always matches type so the DB sign CHECK holds.

Edit ordering: description → amount → date validation; deleted items rejected (invalid-status); approved stays approved; blank category → «Без категорії»; provenance fields (id/inputEventId/parserRunId/importRowNumber/currency/createdAt) preserved.
Service hardening: UUID guard on item id and accountId before repo reads, so a hand-crafted POST yields not-found/account-not-found rather than a Postgres uuid 500; archived account rejected on edit.
Persistence: Pg update() touches only mutable columns; listAll() returns all statuses (deleted included for the log); domain re-sorts authoritatively. In-memory + Postgres parity.
Boundary: app/ledger/page.tsx is a server component (no "use client"); the structural test src/db/no-client-db-import.test.ts passes, so the DB boundary never enters a client bundle (TC-STACK-02/04).
Balances: no independent recomputation — listNonDeleted already excludes deleted; smoke test pins a deleted item drops from the balance but stays in listAll as a log (FR-LEDGER-05, FR-ITEM-05).
SQL: postgres.ts uses the `postgres` client's tagged templates only; no string interpolation of user input.

acceptedMinor.summary: The datetime-local edit field is formatted from / parsed as a UTC wall-clock slice; on save it is parsed as local time, which can drift a few hours from the displayed UTC date. v1 is single-user local (BC-SCOPE-01/03); a proper Europe/Kyiv conversion is a documented later concern (design D2/Risks).
acceptedMinor.rationale: No data-loss or sign/CHECK impact; the stored value is still a valid timestamp and the list remains stably ordered by effective date.

nextSteps: After the session-limit reset, re-dispatch the four fresh reviewers over `git diff dev` (explicit file list), persist their raw outputs under reviews/, and fold confirmed findings.

Independently grade evals/cases/ledger-items.eval.ts with a fresh eval-judge; if it scores within tolerance of the ua-error-clarity baseline (93), write evals/results/latest.json and ratchet quality/eval-baseline.json; otherwise fix the copy.
Only then set clean:true, archive the change, regenerate trace/trajectory + slice report, update docs/current-state.md last, and open the PR to dev.
